_comment: Real Dossier IDs only. Items like 'contact-cta', 'service-list', 'reviews' and 'trust-badges' are SECTIONS (declared in sections.json) and must not appear here. ADR 0012 distinguishes Dossiers (re-usable capabilities, e.g. interactive-game-loop) from sections (parts of a single page). The recommended list is empty until the planned hard Dossiers (resend-contact-form, supabase-auth, stripe-checkout) are imported from MIN_IDE per capability-map.v1.json.

conditional.when: user explicitly asks for an interactive game / mini-game / arcade element
